analysis.semantic_summary: This parser processes AWS Elastic Load Balancer (ELB/ALB) access logs, transforming raw log entries into structured OCSF-compliant events. It captures detailed network traffic information, HTTP request details, TLS parameters, and load balancer performance metrics for security monitoring and analysis.
analysis.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: aws_elasticloadbalancer_logs-latest 
-- OCSF Class: Network Activity (6001)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T12:13:36.309861

-- Pre-declare locals for performance
local type = type
local pairs = pairs
local tonumber = tonumber
local os_time = os.time
local string_format = string.format

-- Validation helper functions
local function validate_ip(ip)
    if not ip then return false end
    local parts = {ip:match("^(%d+)%.(%d+)%.(%d+)%.(%d+)$")}
    if #parts ~= 4 then return false end
    for _, part in pairs(parts) do
        local n = tonumber(part)
        if not n or n < 0 or n > 255 then return false end
    end
    return true
end

local function validate_port(port)
    local n = tonumber(port)
    return n and n >= 0 and n <= 65535
end

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant output with nested structure
    local output = {
        class_uid = 6001,
        class_name = "Network Activity",
        category_uid = 6,
        category_name = "Network Activity",
        activity_id = 1,
        type_uid = 600101,
        metadata = {},
        network_traffic = {},
        access_activity = {},
        network_endpoint = {},
        src = {ip = {}},
        dst = {ip = {}},
        api = {},
        tls = {},
        http_request = {},
        domain_info = {},
        policy = {},
        response = {}
    }

    -- Network endpoint information
    if record.client_port and validate_port(record.client_port) then
        output.network_endpoint.src_port = tonumber(record.client_port)
    end
    if record.backend_port and validate_port(record.backend_port) then
        output.network_endpoint.dst_port = tonumber(record.backend_port)
    end

    -- IP address handling with validation
    if record.client_ip and validate_ip(record.client_ip) then
        output.src.ip.address = record.client_ip
    end
    if record.backend_ip and validate_ip(record.backend_ip) then
        output.dst.ip.address = record.backend_ip
    end

    -- Traffic metrics with type conversion
    if record.received_bytes then
        output.network_traffic.bytes_in = tonumber(record.received_bytes) or 0
    end
    if record.sent_bytes then
        output.network_traffic.bytes_out = tonumber(record.sent_bytes) or 0
    end

    -- Access activity metrics
    if record.request_processing_time then
        output.access_activity.request_processing_time = tonumber(record.request_processing_time)
    end
    if record.backend_processing_time then
        output.access_activity.backend_processing_time = tonumber(record.backend_processing_time)
    end
    if record.response_processing_time then
        output.access_activity.response_processing_time = tonumber(record.response_processing_time)
    end

    -- Status codes
    if record.alb_status_code then
        output.access_activity.load_balancer_status_code = tonumber(record.alb_status_code)
    end
    if record.backend_status_code then
        output.access_activity.backend_status_code = tonumber(record.backend_status_code)
    end

    -- Direct string mappings with sanitization
    local string_fields = {
        {src = "request_verb", dst = "api.request"},
        {src = "request_url", dst = "api.request_url"},
        {src = "request_proto", dst = "authentication.auth_protocol"},
        {src = "user_agent", dst = "http_request.user_agent"},
        {src = "ssl_cipher", dst = "tls.cipher"},
        {src = "ssl_protocol", dst = "tls.protocol"},
        {src = "domain_name", dst = "domain_info.domain"},
        {src = "error_reason", dst = "response.error"}
    }

    -- Efficient batch string processing
    for _, mapping in ipairs(string_fields) do
        local val = record[mapping.src]
        if val and type(val) == "string" then
            -- Sanitize string values
            val = val:gsub("[^%w%s%-_%.:/]", "")
            output[mapping.dst] = val
        end
    end

    -- Timestamp handling
    if record.time then
        output.time = tonumber(record.time) * 1000
    else
        output.time = os_time() * 1000
    end

    -- Final validation
    if not output.class_uid or output.class_uid == 0 then
        return nil, "Invalid class_uid"
    end

    return output
end

test_cases.expected: Complete OCSF output with all fields mapped

test_cases.validation: No nil values in required fields

deployment_notes.monitoring_setup: Enable performance metrics via Observo.ai dashboard

monitoring_recommendations: Alert on memory usage spikes (threshold: 2x baseline)
